--- Main Page ---
Casual Restaurant, Acworth, GA | Zeigler BBQ
Scroll to see more below
COME TO ONE OF ATLANTA MAGAZINEвАЩS TOP RATED BBQ JOINT IN THE ATLANTA MARKET FAMILY OWNED AND OPERATED DINE IN вАУ TO GO вАУ CATERING
Zeigler's BBQ is a family owned and operated fast casual BBQ restaurant that specializes in big flavor with a small town cozy atmosphere. Our goal is to provide with each experience consistently, good quality food at affordable prices. We offer the same warm, inviting service whether you stop in for lunch, pick up food for your event or have us deliver catering for your cooperate event. This is what has kept our regulars coming back for more than 20 years.
Our story
Over 15 years ago Al, with Mary Ann by his side, ditched his daytime cooperate job, put everything they had into the plan and followed his dream of owning his own business and smoking BBQ. In the early years, there were BBQ competitions, backyard fundraisers, school events, and small cooperative events. Those beginnings evolved over the years into thousands of butts being smoked for fundraisers, weekly school events, and cooking for groups of several thousand for catering.
In 2003, they opened their restaurant in Acworth with limited hours for carry out only and focused on their catering daily. Over the first 5 years they gradually increased their hours, added a little bit of seating, and continued to grow their catering business. In 2008 they decided to open 7 days a week. They remodeled the location and added full sit down and became a fast casual restaurant. Business soared and they were well established in the community as a friendly hometown BBQ joint with a loyal following.
Al and Mary AnnвАЩs Daughters Megan and Kelsey grew up working in the family business and in 2015 Kelsey followed her heart into becoming a nurse and Megan continued help grow the family business.
The Zeigler family and staff understand the importance of spending quality time with the ones you love. Whether its a family pack, your next family meal or tailgating with the ones you share the love of the same team with give us a call and savor every moment with them and not in the kitchen with some mouthwatering taste of our down home BBQ. It is sure to please every time!
LOOKING FOR OPTIONSвА¶
We offer a wide variety of services to fill any of your BBQ needs. You can dine in at our cozy fast casual restaurant, order a family pack to go, pick up a party pack for your larger crowd or order catering for delivery. Under the catering service we offer drop off, full service and can customize our service and menu to fit the needs of your event.
ON SITE COOKING
One of our specialty services is offering on site cooking for your larger groups, such as festivals, schools, churches or corporate events. We will set or our mobile cooking equipment and make your guests mouth water with the smell of pecan wood and savor the flavor of the meats smoking on the pit. Zeiglers has over 15 years of experience with cooking for corporate groups sizing up to 4000 people. We serve Acworth, Kennesaw, Woodstock, Marietta, Dallas, Atlanta, and nearby areas.
SIGNATURE MEATS AND SIDES
ZeiglerвАЩs offers a wide variety of signature meats and sides. A few of the crowd favorites are the tender smoked pulled pork and pulled chicken, Texas style brisket, slow smoked spare ribs or our butt rub seasoned chicken. The wings and in house ground and stuffed Texas hot links are another crowd pleaser. ZeiglerвАЩs homestyle mac and cheese flyвАЩs out in all size of trays for their customer convenience. There is a reason why they call them вАЬBBQ beansвАЭ as they are smoked on the pit for a few hours. Their loaded baked potato salad us a unique twist to the traditional potato salad. For the picky slaw lovers out there they have 3 types to choose from. If one of these sides doesnвАЩt suit you they have a total of 13 to choose from.
APPLE BOURBON SAUCE
Our Apple Bourbon Sauce is a instant hit to everyone who tries it. The sauce comes with most meals and family packs but can be purchased by the bottle at the restaurant.
FUNDRAISERS
We have helped teams earn thousands of dollars selling smoked butts for their teams. The excellent product combined with sizable profits for the team is what keeps teams coming back annually for their fundraisers.
PARTY PACKS
You canвАЩt go wrong with a Zeigler Party Pack! Weather you are feeing your neighbors spur of the moment with a gathering (feeds 16) or celebrating your childвАЩs graduation with a Zeigler Feast (feeds 50) we have the perfect size pack for you.
Testimonials
Skye Robinson Entrekin
Always #1 on my list for catering. Best employee appreciation meals yet! Great food with excellent service. We can always count on AL and Mary Anne to add a personal touch to make our 520 employees feel special.
Katherine Burke Beech
We picked up dinner from Ziegler's yesterday for a party. We had pulled pork and pulled chicken, macaroni and cheese and baked beans. It was amazing! All of the guests really enjoyed the food and many of them had not been to Zeigler's before but couldn't say enough wonderful things about the food! Thank you so much for helping me host a successful party!

SATISFYING OUR CUSTOMERS BBQ NEEDS FOR OVER 15 YEARS AND WE LOOK FORWARD TO SERVING YOU
At Zeigler BBQ, weвАЩre best known for our mac and cheese, brisket, and apple bourbon sauce. For more than 15 years, our family-owned and -operated business has been serving great BBQ, chicken, ribs, pork, sausage, and wings

meta.meta_description: Zeigler BBQ in Acworth, GA is a fast casual restaurant that serves delicious food and provides excellent service. A small local family-owned-and-operated business, we do our best to ensure that customers keep coming back. Get in touch with us today for carry-out orders and catering.
